title: Fire Alarm Mod
description: A mod that adds functioning (slightly) fire alarms and pullstations.
body: The Fire Alarm Mod adds (sort of) functional fire alarms and pullstations to the game. The fire alarms make a code-3 120bpm alarm sound, and are activated by a redstone signal. The pullstaions are not that functional yet, as all they do right now is set a redstone block at a location, and when you are holding a pullstation key they do the same thing but set the block to air instead.
